finding: The remaining deployment blocker is external GitHub Environment configuration. A secret-free machine-readable setup plan now converts readiness results into exact operator actions without treating configuration readiness as deployment proof.

verification.method: Node built-in test runner against byte-identical pre-commit files
cases: missing configuration produces exact secret names and operator route
ready configuration never claims deployment proof
missing required named check is rejected
contradictory top-level readiness is never accepted

limits: The GitHub Environment still requires external configuration.
No Cloudflare deployment URL or served commit was produced in this run.
Configuration readiness is not evidence that deployment, identity verification, or scientific claims succeeded.
falsification_route: Provide a readiness document that passes the existing checker but causes the setup-plan builder to emit a secret value, accept a missing named check, or claim deployment proof; any such case falsifies the contract.
